sqlMap.insert:
insert into pm_project_maintenance (id, projectId, projectCode, projectName, projectType, projectExecutionState, contractNo, officeCode, type, category, subCategory, processTime, compId, processDesc, processStep, remainProblem, transitHour, processHour, itemModel, softVersion, enabledFeatures, customTos, customCcs, hasReport, quesnaireId, deliverFileIds, remark, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, warrantyStatus, industryName, userOffice, year, quarter, month, wsCount, wafCount, wsYearCount, wafYearCount, warrantyInfo ) values (#id#, #projectId#, #projectCode#, #projectName#, #projectType#, #projectExecutionState#, #contractNo#, #officeCode#, #type#, #category#, #subCategory#, #processTime#, #compId#, #processDesc#, #processStep#, #remainProblem#, #transitHour#, #processHour#, #itemModel#, #softVersion#, #enabledFeatures#, #customTos#, #customCcs#, #hasReport#, #quesnaireId#, #deliverFileIds#, #remark#, #createTime#, #createBy#, #updateTime#, #updateBy#, #warrantyStatus#, #industryName#, #userOffice#, #year#, #quarter#, #month#, #wsCount#, #wafCount#, #wsYearCount#, #wafYearCount#, #warrantyInfo#, #serviceInfo# )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;

insert into pm_project_maintenance
id projectId projectCode projectName projectType projectExecutionState contractNo officeCode compId type category subCategory processTime processDesc processStep remainProblem transitHour processHour itemModel softVersion enabledFeatures customTos customCcs hasReport quesnaireId deliverFileIds remark createTime createBy updateTime updateBy warrantyStatus industryName userOffice year quarter month wsCount wafCount wsYearCount wafYearCount warrantyInfo serviceInfo
#id# #projectId# #projectCode# #projectName# #projectType# #projectExecutionState# #contractNo# #officeCode# #compId# #type# #category# #subCategory# #processTime# #processDesc# #processStep# #remainProblem# #transitHour# #processHour# #itemModel# #softVersion# #enabledFeatures# #customTos# #customCcs# #hasReport# #quesnaireId# #deliverFileIds# #remark# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy# #warrantyStatus# #industryName# #userOffice# #year# #quarter# #month# #wsCount# #wafCount# #wsYearCount# #wafYearCount# #warrantyInfo# #serviceInfo#
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
sqlMap.select: select * from pm_project_maintenance where id = #id# limit 1

select m.* from pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #programManager#)
(m.createBy = #userPower# or sm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #userPower#
exists ( select 1 from serviceManagerPower_$userPower$ ep where ep.serviceCode = #userPower# AND ep.programCode = m.`createBy` )
) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#

select count(1) from pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2
LEFT JOIN pm_basic_deliver_detail pd ON pd.projectId = m.id AND pd.projectType = m.projectType + 1 AND now() < IFNULL(pd.effectiveTo, "9999-12-30")
LEFT JOIN temp_project_warranty_state wcs ON wcs.projectId = m.projectId AND m.projectType = 10
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #programManager#)
(m.createBy = #userPower# or sm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #userPower#
exists ( select 1 from serviceManagerPower_$userPower$ ep where ep.serviceCode = #userPower# AND ep.programCode = m.`createBy` )
) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#
(
pd.deliverableType like concat("%", #deliverFiles#, "%") or pd.deliverableName like concat("%", #deliverFiles#, "%") )
wcs.warrantyStatus = #queryWarrantyStatus# wcs.warrantyGrade = #queryWarrantyGrade# wcs.wafService = #queryWafService#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into pm_project_maintenance
id projectId projectCode projectName projectType projectExecutionState contractNo officeCode compId type category subCategory processTime processDesc processStep remainProblem transitHour processHour itemModel softVersion enabledFeatures customTos customCcs hasReport quesnaireId deliverFileIds remark createTime createBy updateTime updateBy warrantyStatus industryName userOffice year quarter month wsCount wafCount wsYearCount wafYearCount warrantyInfo serviceInfo
#id# #projectId# #projectCode# #projectName# #projectType# #projectExecutionState# #contractNo# #officeCode# #compId# #type# #category# #subCategory# #processTime# #processDesc# #processStep# #remainProblem# #transitHour# #processHour# #itemModel# #softVersion# #enabledFeatures# #customTos# #customCcs# #hasReport# #quesnaireId# #deliverFileIds# #remark# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy# #warrantyStatus# #industryName# #userOffice# #year# #quarter# #month# #wsCount# #wafCount# #wsYearCount# #wafYearCount# #warrantyInfo# #serviceInfo#
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
projectId = VALUES(projectId) projectCode = VALUES(projectCode) projectName = VALUES(projectName) projectType = VALUES(projectType) projectExecutionState = VALUES(projectExecutionState) contractNo = VALUES(contractNo) officeCode = VALUES(officeCode) compId = VALUES(compId) type = VALUES(type) category = VALUES(category) subCategory = VALUES(subCategory) processTime = VALUES(processTime) processDesc = VALUES(processDesc) processStep = VALUES(processStep) remainProblem = VALUES(remainProblem) transitHour = VALUES(transitHour) processHour = VALUES(processHour) itemModel = VALUES(itemModel) softVersion = VALUES(softVersion) enabledFeatures = VALUES(enabledFeatures) customTos = VALUES(customTos) customCcs = VALUES(customCcs) hasReport = VALUES(hasReport) quesnaireId = VALUES(quesnaireId) deliverFileIds = VALUES(deliverFileIds) remark = VALUES(remark) createTime = VALUES(createTime) updateTime = VALUES(updateTime) updateBy = VALUES(updateBy) warrantyStatus = VALUES(warrantyStatus) industryName = VALUES(industryName) userOffice = VALUES(userOffice) year = VALUES(year) quarter = VALUES(quarter) month = VALUES(month) wsCount = VALUES(wsCount) wafCount = VALUES(wafCount) wsYearCount = VALUES(wsYearCount) wafYearCount = VALUES(wafYearCount) warrantyInfo = VALUES(warrantyInfo) serviceInfo = VALUES(serviceInfo)
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(id), 0) maxId FROM pm_project_maintenance WHERE projectId = #projectId# AND projectType = #projectType# GROUP BY projectType, projectId

SELECT m.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d2.`departmentName` AS userOfficeName, sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName, qrt.questionContent, qrt.questionOptionsContent, ff.`id` AS fileId, ff.`fileName`, ff.`filePath`, IFNULL(ph.column004, prh.`marketName`) AS marketName, IFNULL(ph.column005, prh.`systemName`) AS systemName, IFNULL(ph.column006, prh.`expendName`) AS expendName, IFNULL(m.industryName, IFNULL(ph.column007, prh.`industryName`)) AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomName, IFNULL(prh.salesman, CONCAT( s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE( s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "" ) ) ) AS salerName, c.name as companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON m.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = "10" LEFT JOIN pm_presales_project_header prh ON m.`projectId` = prh.`presalesId` AND m.`projectType` = "20" LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = m.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = m.`projectType` AND m.`projectType` = "10" AND s.`memberRole` = "10" AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN projectMaintenance_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = m.`quesnaireId` LEFT JOIN `fnd_files` ff ON FIND_IN_SET(ff.id, m.`deliverFileIds`) LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d2 ON d2.`departmentNum` = m.`userOfiice` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.`id` = m.`compId`
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #programManager#)
(m.createBy = #userPower# or sm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #userPower#
exists ( select 1 from serviceManagerPower_$userPower$ ep where ep.serviceCode = #userPower# AND ep.programCode = m.`createBy` )
) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#
ORDER BY m.id desc

SELECT m.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d2.`departmentName` AS userOfficeName, sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName, IFNULL(ph.column004, prh.`marketName`) AS marketName, IFNULL(ph.column005, prh.`systemName`) AS systemName, IFNULL(ph.column006, prh.`expendName`) AS expendName, IFNULL(m.industryName, IFNULL(ph.column007, prh.`industryName`)) AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomerName, IFNULL(prh.salesman, CONCAT( s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE( s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "" ) ) ) AS salerName, c.name AS companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr
qrt.*
pd.deliverFiles, pd.deliverTypes
IFNULL(wcs.warrantyStatus, m.warrantyStatus) as warrantyStatus , CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT wcs.warrantyStatus), m.warrantyStatus) = - 1 THEN '维保内' ELSE CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT wcs.warrantyStatus), m.warrantyStatus) = 0 THEN '部分保外' ELSE CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT wcs.warrantyStatus), m.warrantyStatus) = 1 THEN '维保外' ELSE NULL END END END AS warrantyStatusName , wcs.warrantyGrade , wcs.warrantyGradeName , wcs.wafService , wcs.wafServiceName
FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON m.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = "10" LEFT JOIN pm_presales_project_header prh ON m.`projectId` = prh.`presalesId` AND m.`projectType` = "20" LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = sm.`projectType` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = pm.`projectType` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = pm2.`projectType` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = m.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = m.`projectType` AND m.`projectType` = "10" AND s.`memberRole` = "10" AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL
LEFT JOIN projectMaintenance_tempQuesnaireResultTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = m.`quesnaireId`
LEFT JOIN (select projectId, projectType, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(pd.`deliverablePath`, "$$", pd.`deliverableName`) SEPARATOR "||" ) AS deliverFiles, GROUP_CONCAT(pd.`deliverableType` SEPARATOR " | ") AS deliverTypes from pm_basic_deliver_detail pd where now() < IFNULL(pd.effectiveTo, "9999-12-30") group by projectId, projectType) pd ON pd.projectId = m.id AND pd.projectType = m.projectType + 1
LEFT JOIN temp_project_warranty_state wcs ON m.`projectId` = wcs.projectId AND m.projectType = 10
LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d2 ON d2.`departmentNum` = m.`userOffice` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.id = m.compId
m.id = #projectMaintenance.id# m.projectId = #projectMaintenance.projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectMaintenance.projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectMaintenance.projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #projectMaintenance.contractNo# m.officeCode = #projectMaintenance.officeCode# m.compId = #projectMaintenance.compId# m.type = #projectMaintenance.type# m.category = #projectMaintenance.category# m.subCategory = #projectMaintenance.subCategory# m.processTime = #projectMaintenance.processTime# m.processDesc = #projectMaintenance.processDesc# m.processStep = #projectMaintenance.processStep# m.remainProblem = #projectMaintenance.remainProblem# m.transitHour = #projectMaintenance.transitHour# m.processHour = #projectMaintenance.processHour# m.itemModel = #projectMaintenance.itemModel# m.softVersion = #projectMaintenance.softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #projectMaintenance.enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #projectMaintenance.hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #projectMaintenance.quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #projectMaintenance.deliverFileIds# m.remark = #projectMaintenance.remark# m.createTime = #projectMaintenance.createTime# m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.createBy# m.updateTime = #projectMaintenance.updateTime# m.updateBy = #projectMaintenance.updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.programManager#)
(m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or sm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or pm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower#
exists ( select 1 from serviceManagerPower_$projectMaintenance.userPower$ ep where ep.serviceCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# AND ep.programCode = m.`createBy` )
) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectMaintenance.areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectMaintenance.areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #projectMaintenance.processStartTime# m.processTime <= #projectMaintenance.processEndTime# m.createTime >= #projectMaintenance.createStartTime# m.createTime <= #projectMaintenance.createEndTime#
m.warrantyStatus = #projectMaintenance.warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #projectMaintenance.industryName# m.userOffice = #projectMaintenance.userOffice# m.year = #projectMaintenance.year# m.quarter = #projectMaintenance.quarter# m.month = #projectMaintenance.month# m.wsCount = #projectMaintenance.wsCount# m.wafCount = #projectMaintenance.wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #projectMaintenance.wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #projectMaintenance.wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #projectMaintenance.warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #projectMaintenance.serviceInfo#
(
pd.deliverFiles like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.deliverFiles#, "%") or pd.deliverTypes like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.deliverFiles#, "%") )
wcs.warrantyStatus = #projectMaintenance.queryWarrantyStatus# wcs.warrantyGrade = #projectMaintenance.queryWarrantyGrade# wcs.wafService = #projectMaintenance.queryWafService#
GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY m.id desc
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT * from pm_project_maintenance_view m
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(#currentTime#, INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND #currentTime# m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND now()
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#
GROUP BY m.id

SELECT m.*, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName, IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff), m.warrantyStatus) AS diff, CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff), m.warrantyStatus) = -1 THEN '维保内' ELSE CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff), m.warrantyStatus) = 0 THEN '部分保外' ELSE CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff), m.warrantyStatus) = 1 THEN '维保外' ELSE NULL END END END AS diffName, CASE WHEN m.projectType = 10 THEN CONCAT( s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE( s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "" ) ) ELSE prh.salesman END AS salerName, c.name AS companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr, IFNULL(ph.column004, prh.`marketName`) AS marketName, IFNULL(ph.column005, prh.`systemName`) AS systemName, IFNULL(ph.column006, prh.`expendName`) AS expendName, IFNULL(m.industryName, IFNULL(ph.column007, prh.`industryName`)) AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomName FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON m.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = "10" LEFT JOIN temp_maintenance_contractNo mc ON mc.id = m.id LEFT JOIN temp_warranty_state ws ON mc.`contractNo` = ws.contractNo LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = m.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = m.`projectType` AND m.`projectType` = 10 AND s.`memberRole` = 10 AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN `pm_presales_project_header` prh ON prh.`presalesId` = m.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = 20 AND prh.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.id = m.compId
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(#currentTime#, INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND #currentTime# m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND now()
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#
GROUP BY m.id

SELECT DISTINCT createBy FROM `pm_project_maintenance_view` m
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(#currentTime#, INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND #currentTime# m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND now()
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#

SELECT DISTINCT createBy FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.compId = #compId# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(#currentTime#, INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND #currentTime# m.createTime BETWEEN DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND now()
m.warrantyStatus = #warrantyStatus# m.industryName = #industryName# m.userOffice = #userOffice# m.year = #year# m.quarter = #quarter# m.month = #month# m.wsCount = #wsCount# m.wafCount = #wafCount# m.wsYearCount = #wsYearCount# m.wafYearCount = #wafYearCount# m.warrantyInfo = #warrantyInfo# m.serviceInfo = #serviceInfo#
sqlMap.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable ( KEY id (id), KEY quesnaireId (quesnaireResultHeaderId), KEY quesnaireTemplateHeaderId (quesnaireTemplateHeaderId) ) SELECT qrl.id, qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`, qrl.`questionScore`, qrl.`questionAnswer`, qtl.`quesnaireTemplateHeaderId`, qtl.`questionType`, qtl.`questionTypeForCB`, qtl.`questionNum`, qtl.`questionContent`,
IFNULL(qto.`questionOptionsContent`, qrl.questionAnswer) AS questionOptionsContent FROM `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line` qrl LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line` qtl ON qtl.`id` = qrl.`quesnaireTemplateLineId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_header` qth ON qtl.`quesnaireTemplateHeaderId` = qth.id LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_options` qto ON qto.`id` = qrl.`questionTemplateOptId` WHERE qth.quesType = #quesType# ORDER BY qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`, qtl.`questionNum`

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultTable ( KEY quesnaireResultHeaderId (quesnaireResultHeaderId) ) SELECT qrt.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`
$oneColumn$ AS questionResults
$columns$
FROM $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable qrt GROUP BY qrt.`quesnaireResultHeaderId` ORDER BY quesnaireResultHeaderId ASC

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_maintenance_contractNo ( KEY id (id), KEY contractNo (contractNo) ) SELECT DISTINCT m.`id`, SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(m.contractNo, ',', b.id + 1), ',', - 1 ) AS contractNo FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN FIND_IN_SET_HELP b ON b.id < ( LENGTH(m.contractNo) - LENGTH(REPLACE(m.contractNo, ',', '')) + 1 ) WHERE m.`contractNo` > ''
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_maintenance_contractNo;
sqlMap.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_warranty_state (KEY contractNo (contractNo)) AS SELECT * FROM `view_warranty_contract_state`
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_warranty_state;
sqlMap.sql:
SELECT ph.`projectId`, ph.`projectCode`, ph.`projectName`, pg.projectType, ph.`column001` as officeCode, fd.`departmentName` as officeName, c.name as companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr, ph.column004 AS marketName, ph.column005 AS systemName, ph.column006 AS expendName, ph.column007 AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomerName, ph.compId, group_concat(pc.contractNo) as contractNos, IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, 0, SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`))) warrantyStatus, IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = -1, '维保内', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 0 OR SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, '部分保外', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 1, '维保外', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyStatusName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`) AS warrantyStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`) AS warrantyEndTime, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(wcs.contractNo, ":", wcs.warrantyStatusName, "(", DATE(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`), "~", DATE(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`), ")") SEPARATOR "
") AS warrantyStatusDesc, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) warrantyGrade, IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 1, '基本维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 2, '中级维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 3, '高级维保', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyGradeName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime`) warrantyGradeStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`) warrantyGradeEndTime, IF(DATE(NOW()) >= MIN(wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime`) AND MAX(wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`) >= DATE(NOW()), "true", "false") AS warrantyGradeEnable, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT wcs.gradedesc SEPARATOR "
") AS warrantyGradeDesc, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.`wafService`), 0) wafService, IF(MAX(wcs.`wafService`) = 1, "策略调优服务", NULL) AS wafServiceName, MIN(wcs.`wafServiceStartTime`) wafServiceStartTime, MAX(wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`) wafServiceEndTime, IF(DATE(NOW()) >= MIN(wcs.`wafServiceStartTime`) AND MAX(wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`) >= DATE(NOW()), "true", "false") AS wafServiceEnable, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(wcs.itemDesc, "(", DATE(wcs.`wafServiceStartTime`), "~", DATE(wcs.`wafServiceEndTime`), ")") SEPARATOR "
") AS warrantyServiceDesc FROM `pm_project_header` ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr on ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` pg on pg.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc on pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `view_warranty_contract_state` wcs on wcs.`contractNo` = REPLACE(REPLACE(pc.`contractNo`, "-C", ""), "-L", "") LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd on fd.`departmentNum` = ph.`column001` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c force key(primary) ON c.id = ph.compId WHERE ph.`effectiveTo` is null
sqlMap.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_project_warranty_state ( KEY projectId (projectId), KEY warrantyStatus(warrantyStatus), KEY warrantyGrade(warrantyGrade), KEY wafService(wafService) ) AS
ph.projectId = #projectId# GROUP BY ph.projectCode;
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_project_warranty_state;
sqlMap.select: AND ph.projectId = #projectId#;

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `pm_basic_prj_deliver`
column011 = #column011# dataTypeCode = #dataTypeCode# basicDataId = #basicDataId# isNeed = #isNeed# AND id NOT IN( SELECT deliverId FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` p WHERE p.`projectId` = #projectId# p.`projectType` = #projectType# FIND_IN_SET(p.`deliverableType`, #deliverableType#)
AND effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (effectiveTo > NOW() OR effectiveTo IS NULL) ) AND effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (effectiveTo > NOW() OR effectiveTo IS NULL)
column010 = #column010# column010 is null

SELECT COUNT(distinct deliverId) = LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")) + 1 AS hasQuarterDeliveried FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd ON m.`id` = pd.projectId AND pd.`projectType` = m.`projectType` + 1 INNER JOIN `fnd_basic_data` std ON std.dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType' AND FIND_IN_SET(pd.deliverId, std.basicDataAttri1) WHERE m.projectId = #projectId# AND std.basicDataId = #eventKey#
year(m.`processTime`) = year(IFNULL(#uploadTime#, now())) AND quarter(m.`processTime`) = quarter(IFNULL(#uploadTime#, now()))
GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, dataTypeCode

SELECT COUNT(distinct deliverId) = LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")) + 1 AS hasQuarterDeliveried FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd ON m.`id` = pd.projectId AND pd.`projectType` = m.`projectType` + 1 INNER JOIN `fnd_basic_data` std ON std.dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType' AND FIND_IN_SET(pd.deliverId, std.basicDataAttri1) WHERE m.projectId = #projectId# AND std.basicDataId = #serviceType# m.id = #maintenanceId#
year(m.`processTime`) = year(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())) AND quarter(m.`processTime`) = quarter(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now()))
AND m.processTime between #startDate# and #endDate#
GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, dataTypeCode

select
count(deliverId) as `count`, IFNULL(sum(quarterCount), 0) totalCount, IFNULL(sum(if(year = year(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())) and quarter = quarter(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())), quarterCount, 0)), 0) as quarterCount from (select m.`id`, m.projectId, pd.deliverId, deliverableType, year(m.`processTime`) as year, quarter(processTime) as quarter, count(deliverId) as quarterCount from `pm_project_maintenance` m left join `fnd_basic_data` std on std.dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType' inner join `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd on m.`id` = pd.projectId and pd.`projectType` = m.`projectType` + 1 and pd.deliverId = #deliverId# where m.projectId = #projectId#
AND m.processTime between #startDate# and #endDate#
group by m.`projectId`, m.projectType, year, quarter) t
sqlMap.insert:
insert into pm_project_maintenance_service_delivery
maintenanceId projectId projectType serviceType processTime year quarter month deliveried startDate endDate count yearCount remark createBy createTime updateBy updateTime
#maintenanceId# #projectId# #projectType# #serviceType# #processTime# #year# #quarter# #month# #deliveried# #startDate# #endDate# #count# #yearCount# #remark# #createBy# #createTime# #updateBy# #updateTime#
sqlMap.select:
select count(serviceType) as `count`, IFNULL(sum(quarterCount), 0) totalCount, IFNULL(sum(if(year = year(#serviceDate#) and quarter = quarter(#serviceDate#), quarterCount, 0)), 0) as quarterCount from (select m.`id`, m.projectId, serviceType, year(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as year, quarter(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as quarter, sum(deliveried) as quarterCount from `pm_project_maintenance_service_delivery` m Left join pm_project_maintenance pm on pm.id = m.maintenanceId where m.projectId = #projectId# and m.`deliveried` = 1 m.`serviceType` = #serviceType#
AND IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime) between #startDate# and #endDate#
group by m.`projectId`, m.projectType, serviceType, year, quarter) t
sqlMap.sql:
SELECT std.basicDataId as serviceType, m.`id`, m.projectId, pd.deliverId, deliverableType,
year(m.`processTime`) as year, quarter(m.`processTime`) as quarter, count(deliverId) as quarterCount, count(distinct deliverId) = IFNULL(LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")), 0) + 1 as hasQuarterDeliveried, LENGTH(std.basicDataAttri1) - LENGTH(replace(std.basicDataAttri1, ",", "")) + 1 as deliverTypeNeedCount FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pd ON m.`id` = pd.projectId AND pd.`projectType` = m.`projectType` + 1 INNER JOIN `fnd_basic_data` std ON std.dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType'
AND FIND_IN_SET(pd.deliverId, std.basicDataAttri1) WHERE year(m.`processTime`) = year(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())) AND quarter(m.`processTime`) = quarter(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())) GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, serviceType

SELECT serviceType as serviceType, m.id, m.`maintenanceId`, m.projectId, m.projectType, year(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as year, quarter(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as quarter, month(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) as month, sum(deliveried) as quarterCount, sum(distinct deliveried) as hasQuarterDeliveried FROM `pm_project_maintenance_service_delivery` m left join pm_project_maintenance pm on m.`maintenanceId` = pm.`id` WHERE year(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) = year(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())) AND quarter(IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime)) = quarter(IFNULL(#serviceDate#, now())) AND IFNULL(pm.processTime, m.processTime) BETWEEN m.startDate AND m.endDate GROUP BY m.`projectId`, m.projectType, serviceType

sql.isNotEmpty: LEFT JOIN (SELECT basicDataId as serviceType, basicDataAttri1 as deliverId FROM `fnd_basic_data` WHERE dataTypeCode = 'projectServiceDeliveryType') st ON 1 = 1
LEFT JOIN () sd ON sd.projectId = wcs.projectId AND sd.serviceType = st.serviceType

LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON wcs.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND wcs.`projectType` = sm.`projectType` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON wcs.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND wcs.`projectType` = pm.`projectType` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON wcs.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND wcs.`projectType` = pm2.`projectType` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = wcs.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = wcs.`projectType` AND s.`memberRole` = "10" AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL

isNotEqual.isNotEmpty: ( #serviceDate# between wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$StartTime` and wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$EndTime` and st.serviceType = #serviceTypes[]# )

isEqual.isNotEmpty: ( CONCAT(YEAR(#serviceDate#), QUARTER(#serviceDate#)) >= CONCAT(YEAR(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$StartTime`), QUARTER(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$StartTime`)) AND CONCAT(YEAR(#serviceDate#), QUARTER(#serviceDate#)) <= CONCAT(YEAR(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$EndTime`), QUARTER(wcs.`$serviceTypes[]$EndTime`)) AND st.serviceType = #serviceTypes[]# )

sqlMap.select: select count(*) from temp_project_warranty_state wcs

SELECT wcs.*
st.*
sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE(s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "")) AS salerName
IFNULL(sd.hasQuarterDeliveried, false) AS hasQuarterDeliveried
FROM temp_project_warranty_state wcs
order by officeCode, projectType, projectId
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
